system.description: An association of ancient spirits who have not gone feral with the passage of time.
system.assets: Several secret and hidden spirit wells across the city and in the deathlands, which give the Reconciled the arcane energy they need to survive.
system.quirks: The spirits of the Reconciled do not lose their minds or become obsessed with vengeance as other spirits do. They can possess a victim indefinitely without any adverse effects.
system.notables: The Reconciled have possessed several important citizens in Doskvol. Their exact membership is not known.
system.enemies: The Church of Ecstasy, Spirit Wardens, Sparkwrights.
system.situation: The Reconciled are very ancient and wise; they see themselves as the rightful and just rulers that Duskwall needs. A few of the City Council members have become initiates in the Path of Echoes and will soon be vulnerable to possession by the Reconciled. These councilors are also high-ranking members of the Church of the Ecstasy of the Flesh, which will give the Reconciled an opportunity for infiltration into that organization as well.
